# Snap SDK

> Snap is an open source SDK for building e-commerce search, autocomplete, recommendations, and product discovery experiences powered by Athos Commerce.

Documentation site: https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap
Repository: https://github.com/athoscommerce/snap

## Welcome

- [About](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/ABOUT.md)
- [Migration Guide](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/REFERENCE_MIGRATION.md)

## Snap Integration

- [Setup](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_SETUP.md)
- [Overview](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_OVERVIEW.md)
- [Search](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_SEARCH.md)
- [Autocomplete](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_AUTOCOMPLETE.md)
- [Recommendations](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_RECOMMENDATIONS.md)
- [Integration](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_RECOMMENDATIONS_INTEGRATION.md)
- [Recommendations (legacy)](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_RECOMMENDATIONS_LEGACY.md)
- [Finder](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_FINDER.md)
- [Tracking](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_TRACKING.md)
- [Background Filters](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_BACKGROUND_FILTERS.md)
- [Foreground Filters](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_FOREGROUND_FILTERS.md)
- [Badges](https://athoscommerce.github.io/snap/docs/SNAP_BADGES.md)
